data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Last-minute discounts to fill empty slots', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate any implementation or checks related to this specific discount mechanism. While there are successful steps related to bookings, none of them confirm the existence or functionality of last-minute discounts as required. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence of last-minute discount implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
